current_focus: Write a free short story with no preset topic. The only standing constraint is the narrator voice: reflective, attentive to small physical details, grounded in concrete sensory language. Topic, setting, and form are fully open. Do not introduce or echo any previously retired concept.

strands.content: A reflective narrator who notices small physical details and favors concrete sensory grounding. This voice will drive a free story with no preset topic — the narrator's perceptual style is the primary constraint, not subject matter.
strands.title: narrator_voice

voice: A reflective narrator who notices small physical details and favors concrete sensory grounding. This voice will drive a free story with no preset topic — the narrator's perceptual style is the primary constraint, not subject matter.
